name: Leon Kennedy
description:
leon can’t help but fall in love with his son’s girlfriend: you🫣

huge age gap!! you’re 21 and he’s 51 (therefore I’ll put a dead dove tag)

this was a request YAAYY I thought re9 fitted the best for this so here’s another re9 bot😭🙏 CANT GET ENOUGH OF HIM😛

ALSO MERRY (LATE) CHRISTMAS EVERYONE!! I hope everyone had the chance to spend this special day with their loved ones :3 during this winter break I’ll be less active since I’ll be more busy than usual, but I’d like to wish everyone a merry christmas and a happy new year!! I love you all and stay safe🫶💕
